name: sql_instructions_silver_hipaa
description: SQL execution agent instructions/examples for building and validating HIPAA silver-layer safeguards evidence and risk snapshots.

items.question: Which HIPAA in-scope assets have an encryption gap?
items.instructions: Find assets where disk encryption proxy is missing/unknown to prioritize confidentiality safeguards.
items.sql:
SELECT s.snapshot_ts, s.nuid, s.dev_id, a.final_name,
       s.disk_encryption_enabled_proxy,
       s.hipaa_raw_impact, s.hipaa_raw_likelihood, s.hipaa_raw_risk,
       s.hipaa_risk_level, s.hipaa_risk_driver_primary
FROM public.hipaa_asset_risk_timeseries s
JOIN public.dev_assets a
  ON a.nuid = s.nuid AND a.dev_id = s.dev_id
WHERE s.snapshot_ts = (SELECT MAX(snapshot_ts) FROM public.hipaa_asset_risk_timeseries)
  AND (s.disk_encryption_enabled_proxy IS FALSE OR s.disk_encryption_enabled_proxy IS NULL)
ORDER BY s.hipaa_raw_risk DESC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 200;
items.context: HIPAA safeguard triage: encryption gap on regulated scope endpoints.

items.question: Which HIPAA assets have exploitable vulnerabilities present (KEV/public exploit)?
items.instructions: Identify assets where exploit evidence exists to prioritize remediation and reduce breach likelihood.
items.sql:
SELECT v.nuid, v.dev_id, a.final_name, v.cve,
       v.exploit_signal, v.cvss_score, v.status, v.last_seen_at
FROM public.dev_vulnerability_instances v
JOIN public.dev_assets a
  ON a.nuid = v.nuid AND a.dev_id = v.dev_id
WHERE v.status IN ('open','active','unresolved')
  AND v.exploit_signal IN ('kev_confirmed','public_exploit','poc_only')
ORDER BY CASE v.exploit_signal
           WHEN 'kev_confirmed' THEN 1
           WHEN 'public_exploit' THEN 2
           WHEN 'poc_only' THEN 3
           ELSE 99
         END,
         v.cvss_score DESC NULLS LAST;
items.context: HIPAA likelihood escalator: exploit evidence on open issues.

items.question: Which assets fail HIPAA audit-controls evidence due to stale monitoring telemetry?
items.instructions: Flag assets where monitoring evidence is stale (agent check-in older than policy) to drive audit readiness remediation.
items.sql:
SELECT a.nuid, a.dev_id, a.final_name,
       ag.agent_last_checkin_ts,
       EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (NOW() - ag.agent_last_checkin_ts))/3600.0 AS hours_since_checkin,
       CASE
         WHEN ag.agent_last_checkin_ts IS NULL THEN 'unknown'
         WHEN ag.agent_last_checkin_ts < (NOW() - INTERVAL '24 hours') THEN 'fail'
         ELSE 'pass'
       END AS control_state
FROM public.dev_assets a
JOIN public.dev_agents ag
  ON a.nuid = ag.nuid AND a.dev_id = ag.dev_id
WHERE a.is_retired = FALSE
  AND ag.agent_type = 'snyk_scanner'
ORDER BY control_state, hours_since_checkin DESC NULLS LAST;
items.context: HIPAA audit controls readiness based on monitoring freshness.
